creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I can't reproduce it so it must be an error on your side. 
If not tell me the step I did wrong when trying to reproduce the error: 

1. move ~/.gftp to ~/.gftp.bak to start with a clean environment 
2. start gftp by executing gftp-gtk 
3. open Options dialog by using the Menuentry "Options..." in the FTP Menu 
4. switch to the FTP Tab by selecting "FTP" on the top of the Options dialog 
5. put "1" into each text box on that page 
6. select Proxy server type "SITE command" 
7. press the OK button 
8. close gFTP by  using the "Quit" Menuentry in the FTP Menu 
9. redo step 2, 3 and 4 and see that the tab is at the same state as it was after point 6 

I've also selected "Custom" in step 6 and entered some data in the textbox and the info was still there after restarting gFTP.
